title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code, to help sales representatives draft customer emails in their own voice. The tool reduces administrative burden on GTM teams by automating email composition.
